title: Agasatha Lyrics Cuckoo Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Agasatha
Singer(s): Kalyani Nair, Pradeep Kumar
Lyricist: Yuga Bharathi
Music: Santhosh Narayanan
Movie: Cuckoo (2014)

Agasatha Naan paakuren
aaru kadal naan paaakkuren.
Agasatha Naan paakuren
aaru kadal naan paaakkuren.

Kannaala edhayum kaanaadha
imaithaan kanneera paarthaeney.
Ini ennoda azhaga
ponnaana azhaga unnaala paarpeney.

Agasatha Naan paakuren
aaru kadal naan paaakkuren
Agasatha Naan paakuren
aaru kadal naan paaakkuren

Ooru kanne padumpadi
uravaadum kanave thoduradhu.
Nenavaagum kanave arugile
unna thooki somapen karuvile.
Madi vaasam podhum urangave
nee thaaney saaga varangale.

Tamizhe tamizhe varuveney
un karamaa.
Kodiye kodiye azhareney
aanandhamaa.

Agasatha Naan paakuren
aaru kadal naan paaakkuren
Agasatha Naan paakuren
aaru kadal naan paaakkuren

Kaamba thaedum kozhandhaya
unna thaedum usuru pasiyila.
kodi peril unna mattum
ariveney thodugira mozhiyila.

Peranbu pola yedhumilla
nee podhum naanum inaiyilla.
Azhaga azhaga Kuyilaaven un thozhil
azhagi azhagi idhu podhum  vazhnaalil

Agasatha Naan paakuren
aaru kadal naan paaakkuren

aaru kadal naan paaakkuren.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

Who are the singers of the song Agasatha?

The song is sung by Kalyani Nair and Pradeep Kumar.

Which movie features the song Agasatha?

The song is featured in the Tamil movie Cuckoo, released in 2014.

Who composed the music for the song Agasatha?

The music was composed by the talented Santhosh Narayanan.

What is the theme of the song Agasatha?

The song beautifully portrays themes of love and longing, resonating deeply with its listeners.

Who are the lead actors in the movie Cuckoo?

The lead roles in the movie were portrayed by Dinesh Ravi and Malavika Nair.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Agasatha from the Tamil movie Cuckoo, released in 2014, is a soulful melody that captures the essence of love and longing. Featuring the voices of Kalyani Nair and Pradeep Kumar, the song is composed by Santhosh Narayanan with lyrics by Yugabharathi. The film stars Dinesh Ravi and Malavika Nair in lead roles, portraying a poignant love story. This melodious track resonates with listeners, evoking deep emotions and a sense of nostalgia.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Agasatha, a mesmerizing melody from the acclaimed Tamil movie Cuckoo, showcases the soulful voices of Kalyani Nair and Pradeep Kumar. Composed by the talented Santhosh Narayanan with heartfelt lyrics by Yugabharathi, this song captures the essence of love and longing. Its evocative tune and poetic verses make it a timeless piece cherished by music enthusiasts.
stanzaMeanings: I see the sky, I see the six seas. I see the sky, I see the six seas.
With my eyes, I see everything that cannot be seen. Now, I will see you, my beautiful girl, with your beauty.
I see the sky, I see the six seas. I see the sky, I see the six seas.
In the town, the dreams of the girl are connected. The dreams that will become thoughts are lifted beside you. You alone can sleep peacefully in the embrace of the night.
I will come in Tamil, your love. I will cry with joy, my dear.
I see the sky, I see the six seas. I see the sky, I see the six seas.
In the search for the child, I find you in the breath of hunger. I only know you in the words that begin with the letter 'k'.
There is nothing like a bond, you and I are not connected. Beautiful, beautiful, like a cuckoo, your work is beautiful, this is enough for a lifetime.
I see the sky, I see the six seas. I see the sky, I see the six seas.
With my eyes, I see everything that cannot be seen. Now, I will see you, my beautiful girl, with your beauty.
